facts: LINDE + WIEMANN US Inc. operates a facility located at 1720 Knox Bridge Crossing Rd, 30553, Lavonia / GA – US.
The Georgia plant covers an area of 4,100 m².
Access to the Lavonia facility is via exit 177 on I-85 from both Atlanta (South) and Greenville (North).
Driving directions specify that after turning at a 4-way stop sign, the plant is visible on the left-hand side.
US Governor Nathan Deal visited LINDE + WIEMANN.
LINDE + WIEMANN manufactures automotive components including seat cross members and cross members.

links.context: Contact phone number for LINDE + WIEMANN US Inc.

source_title: US governor Nathan Deal visits LINDE + WIEMANN - Linde + Wiemann
